DL Copper Ferment — unique bio-fermented active combining copper peptides with fermentation bioactives
notes: Deveraux Specialties is a specialty cosmetic ingredient supplier with a focus on bio-fermented actives. Their DL Copper Ferment is a unique bio-fermented active ingredient that combines the benefits of copper peptides with fermentation-derived bioactives, delivering anti-aging, skin brightening, and barrier repair benefits. Deveraux's fermentation platform enables the production of novel bioactive compounds with enhanced bioavailability and efficacy, offering formulators differentiated performance versus traditional single-mechanism actives.

Deveraux Specialties is a specialty cosmetic ingredient supplier with a focus on bio-fermented actives. Their DL Copper Ferment is a unique bio-fermented active ingredient that combines the benefits of copper peptides with fermentation-derived bioactives, delivering anti-aging, skin brightening, and barrier repair benefits. Deveraux's fermentation platform enables the production of novel bioactive compounds with enhanced bioavailability and efficacy.

Deveraux Specialties is a specialty cosmetic ingredient supplier with a focus on bio-fermented actives. Their DL Copper Ferment is a unique bio-fermented active ingredient that combines the benefits of copper peptides with fermentation-derived bioactives, delivering anti-aging, skin brightening, and barrier repair benefits. Deveraux's fermentation platform enables the production of novel bioactive compounds with enhanced bioavailability and efficacy compared to traditional extraction methods.
